title: • Check that the purpose aligns with the overall project vision.
content:
• Check that the purpose aligns with the overall project vision.

    • Checklist:
    • [ ] One-sentence goal clearly defined
    • [ ] Specific and actionable
    • [ ] Matches project vision

    1.2 Background

    Instructions:
    1. Define why the system is being created.
    2. Identify the intended users or audience.
    3. Specify the desired output format for the AI.

    Checklist:
    • [ ] Rationale documented
    • [ ] Users identified
    • [ ] Output format specified

    ---

    2. Thematic and Conceptual Inputs


    2.1 High-Level Themes

    Instructions:
    1. List the guiding concepts for the AI.
    2. Include all relevant theoretical or narrative elements.
    3. Confirm each concept aligns with the project’s creative direction.
